title: ASR Outdoor Water Resistant Storage Belt Waist Travel Pouch Adjustable Buckle
description:
Keep your items safe from the elements with the ASR Outdoor Water Resistant Travel Belt! This belt features a hook and loop closure as well as a 2 step waterproof seal to ensure that your belongings stay safe and dry while on the go. The pocket is about 11" x 2" x 2", so you'll be able to hold your ID, cards, phone, cash, keys and other small essentials. The belt comes with an adjustable 2" buckle, so one size fits most. This is a great belt for running, boating, hiking, traveling, hunting and more!
